title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India Holdings Services in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India Holdings Services:
Walmart India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India Holdings Services!
